subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, yet most among the people remain heedless. Indeed, he who hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات ولکن الناس اکثرهم من الغافلین ان الذی فاز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the concourse on high, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels
